messages.content:
<image>
Locate the region or regions needed to answer the question in each document image. Return only JSON grouped by page in this format: [[[x1, y1, x2, y2], ...], ...]. Each outer item corresponds to one input image/page in order. Each inner item is one bounding box with normalized coordinates between 0 and 1000.
